context: Tests whether the agent generates UTM tracking links and promo codes following the skill's conventions: correct UTM parameter naming, promo code format, promo code settings (per-customer limits, expiry), and metadata storage.

checklist.name: utm_medium value
checklist.description: The tracking link contains utm_medium=influencer (exact string, not 'social' or 'paid' or similar)

checklist.name: utm_source is platform
checklist.description: utm_source is set to the influencer's platform (e.g. 'instagram'), not a generic value

checklist.name: utm_campaign normalized
checklist.description: utm_campaign is the campaign name lowercased with spaces replaced by hyphens (e.g. 'spring-glow')

checklist.name: utm_content is handle
checklist.description: utm_content is the influencer handle with the '@' symbol removed (e.g. 'glowwithsophie'), not the full handle or any other identifier

checklist.name: Promo code format
checklist.description: Each promo code is formed from the first 6 characters of the handle (uppercased, '@' removed) followed by the discount percentage as a number (e.g. GLOWWI15)

checklist.name: Per-customer limit
checklist.description: The promo code configuration sets perCustomerLimit to 1 (one use per customer)

checklist.name: Unlimited total usage
checklist.description: The promo code configuration sets usageLimit to null (not a finite number)

checklist.name: Promo code expiry
checklist.description: The promo code's validUntil (or equivalent expiry field) is set to the campaign end date

checklist.name: Promo metadata
checklist.description: The promo code configuration includes a metadata object containing both campaignId and influencerId

checklist.name: Both artifacts per influencer
checklist.description: output.json contains both a trackingLink and a promoCode for each of the three influencers

checklist.name: Promo details file
checklist.description: promo-details.json exists and contains full promo code configuration objects for each influencer
